title: MTR Low effort IÉ Class 8500, 8510 and 8520
description: Low effort IÉ Class 8500, 8510 and 8520 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort IÉ Class 8500, 8510 and 8520
IÉ Class 8500, 8510 and 8520 from retextured M-Train from base mod.
![trains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaf8653dd650ae1b6dda370720ad943f37152d77_0.webp)
## Features
- Class 8500, 8510
- Class 8520
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
